programme.title: Noorie
programme.desc: Yusuf and Noorie are set to get married but after her father's sudden death, the wedding is postponed. While work takes Yusuf out of town, Noorie is left to fend for herself from many evils. Release Year: 1979 Director: Manmohan Krishna

programme.title: Shor Se Shuruaat
programme.desc: An anthology of seven short films that revolve around the theme of noise and depict real-life issues. Release Year: 2016 Director: Amira Bhargava, Rahul V. Chittella, Satish Raj Kasireddi

programme.title: Loveyapa
programme.desc: A couple swaps phones, leading to chaos. They discover secrets and face harsh truths about each other's hidden lives. The exchange unravels their relationship. Release Year: 2025 Director: Advait Chandan

programme.title: Rakshak
programme.desc: Demeaned all his life, Raghu decides to teach the world a lesson by printing the best ever fake currency notes. Release Year: 1996 Director: Ashok Honda

programme.title: The President Is Coming
programme.desc: Six young contestants undergo bizarre tests and stop at nothing to top the list of the young faces responsible for shaping 'The New India' and eventually meet George Bush.

programme.title: Serie A Club Classic Archive E94 -Napoli vs Inter - 2018/19
E1 - Florida
programme.desc: Florida is famous for its sandy shores—and there’s plenty to go around. Florida has the most tidal shoreline of any state in the continental USA. These ocean-side playgrounds are also critical habitats for threatened and endangered species.

programme.title: E6 - Leopard
programme.desc: Prowl the Sri Lankan jungle with the leopard, who is a master of camouflage. See how this formidable feline hunter has adapted perfectly to the hot, dry climate on the island, then discover its best tricks for stalking and catching deer.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E4 - Ice

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands

programme.title: E1 - Florida
programme.desc: Florida is famous for its sandy shores—and there’s plenty to go around. Florida has the most tidal shoreline of any state in the continental USA. These ocean-side playgrounds are also critical habitats for threatened and endangered species.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E6 - Leopard
programme.desc: Prowl the Sri Lankan jungle with the leopard, who is a master of camouflage. See how this formidable feline hunter has adapted perfectly to the hot, dry climate on the island, then discover its best tricks for stalking and catching deer.

programme.title: E1 - Florida

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

E12 - Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy 'Cauliflower Creak' song.

programme.title: E48 - Come Back Cobs
programme.desc: The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.

programme.title: E49 - Big Net Rescue
programme.desc: Carrot is determined to save Supertato from Evil Pea's trap without help from Prickly Pear

programme.title: E5 - Chicken
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of chickens - a brown chicken, a white chicken, a clucking chicken and some friendly chickens.

programme.title: E5 - Ufo
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E47 - Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E1 - Star
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: E23 - The Theatre Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: E32 - Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E18 - Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble.

programme.title: E34 - Buttons
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E46 - Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: E92 - Feeling Better

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Totally Gross!
programme.desc: A gross stink has been detected in the vicinity of the doctors' lab. With health and safety experts on their way, Dr. Chris, Dr. Xand, and Dr. Ronx must identify the source of the grossness before the lab is shut down!

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Stinky Shoes
programme.desc: Why do Oto's lucky shoes smell exactly like stinky cheese? If they answer that question, maybe the team can deodorize Oto's smelly shoes and the clubhouse! They head to a stinky cheese festival in Limburger, Belgium, to learn what makes things smell.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries of the Solar System
programme.desc: Even though spacecraft have been sent to every planet in our solar system, many mysteries remain. Host Emily Calandrelli searches for answers to celestial mysteries that stump even our brightest scientists.

programme.title: Preparing for Mars
programme.desc: Emily talks to scientists about the next stop in our solar system – Mars. She meets Curiosity, the rover currently exploring Mars and unlocking its mysteries. And at the Mars Desert Research Station, a group of students find out what it could be like to live on Mars.

programme.title: Totally Gross!
programme.desc: A gross stink has been detected in the vicinity of the doctors' lab. With health and safety experts on their way, Dr. Chris, Dr. Xand, and Dr. Ronx must identify the source of the grossness before the lab is shut down!

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Quitting's Not An Option
programme.desc: Artistic gymnast Madi has not had luck on her side as she has recently suffered an injury. Thankfully, she is now back to full fitness and is off to her grading competition to see if she can pass the tests and qualify as an elite gymnast.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Rope
programme.desc: Summertime is here! Hepi and Briko have the perfect plan to re use all this rope we have lying around.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Tsunami
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery fight the albatross for the stolen safety buoys.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe has to make some complicated calculations, but she has no electronic device at hand that could help her with that, so she is in a bit of a panic. Milo does not seem to have an answer. As for Alim, he sees the solution to her problems in a trip to Iran!

programme.title: New Orleans
programme.desc: New Orleans charm: Culinary delights at New Orleans School of Cooking, swamp tour with alligators, Habitat for Humanity in the 9th ward, and jazz appreciation at a local music club. A week of rich experiences with Nicole and local teens in the vibrant city!

programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe

programme.title: NBA Playoffs Presented by Google Pixel 2026 -W. Conf. 1st Rd Game 3 - Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets
NBA Playoffs Presented by Google Pixel 2026 -W. Conf. 1st Rd Game 3 - Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets
E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Kill Chain: The Cyber War On America's Elections
programme.desc: A chilling look at how vulnerable the technology used in the US voting systems really is.

programme.title: Bury My Heart At Wounded Knee
programme.desc: An HBO Original film which explores the impact after the US government wages a campaign to exterminate American Indians.

programme.title: North Country
programme.desc: A single mother retaliates against her male co-workers in an iron mine, leading to the first class-action lawsuit for sexual discrimination in America.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams is taken hostage, Nathan turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

programme.title: John McCain: For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Explore the life of Sen. John McCain in this illuminating profile of one of the most influential forces in modern American politics.

programme.title: North Country
programme.desc: A single mother retaliates against her male co-workers in an iron mine, leading to the first class-action lawsuit for sexual discrimination in America.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: Vasudha E516
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E291
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: HK Stylized Thriller: Missing
programme.desc: In 2005, a high-profile case of a police officer who disappeared during a forest hike spawned urban legends about the existence of a gateway into another world. In 2016, those legends inspired popular internet novel Missing, which is now being adapted into an eerie supernatural thriller by first-time director and Fresh Wave alum Ronnie Chau. Former pop idol Gillian Chung stars as a social worker who hires a mountain guide to search for her missing father in the mountains. She discovers the mystical gateway from the urban legends, but is her father really waiting for her on the other side?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Falling into the Abyss of the Heart
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai shares his unforgettable memories filming for the movie “Reborn”. He reveals that his hug with Venus Wong had sparked a “spousal” chemistry even before the filming began, and he also tells how he was once stuck in negative emotions after the filming ended. In spite of the story setting, he affirms that this is not a horror film. Follow Siu Fai and more behind-the-scene stories are to be unveiled.

programme.title: OMG! Mom's Big News
programme.desc: Rita, 53, and her husband Siu Hung were planning their retirement when they suddenly discovered that they were pregnant! Both the couple wanted to have the child removed, but they didn't know how to tell each other. Until at a family dinner, two children accidentally discovered the secret of their mother, and the reaction was uproar. At the same time, Siu Hung's sister-Fuk Ling returned from abroad and decided to move in with everyone. The incompatible relationship between sister-in-law and sister-in-law suddenly plunged the Lee family into a chaotic dispute. In anger, Rita decided to become a senior mother and decided to give birth to the child in her belly. The peaceful and well-off family began an unprecedented 'big reform'. However, during this wonderful pregnancy process, everyone began to become different because of this sudden little life...including Fuk Ling, who had been married for many years but did not want to have children; his otaku son who was not good at expre

programme.title: The Third Eye
programme.desc: Zhang Liang is a young man who does not engage into any proper work. His secret hobby is to play with all kinds of high-tech candid technology, especially the candid photographs. He likes to upload the photographs on the Internet to share his homepage with others. Within his beloved masterpiece, he specially falls madly in love on a young air-stewardess. One day, Zhang Liang follows the young lady Amy from the airport to Tai O. In order to catch more splendid segments, Liang brings his full equipment all the way to stay in a vacation house - Mei King Village and becomes a neighbour of Amy...

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Major transport in an open-cast mine. A huge steel frame has to be moved to another site. A job for heavy transport professional Randolf Peters. The route: an obstacle course. Tight bends, steep downhill sections and obstructing power lines have to be overcome. The heavy transport has to be kept in sight every second. This means running backwards for kilometres and precision work with heavy transport equipment.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E212 - Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him!

programme.title: E250 - Karen's Baby
programme.desc: Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E504 - Kernet of Truth
programme.desc: Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: E306 - Pat-per Route / Day of the Dartfish
programme.desc: Patrick helps Squidward with his newspaper delivery job to compensate for injuring him. // In the midst of a typical day of scavenging, the Dartfish family discovers a thief in the Star home.

programme.title: E310 - Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry’s house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: E202 - Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: E277 - Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E8 - 東北冰雪遊戲大亂鬥
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E11 - 明道帶王鷗見父母
programme.desc: 三對明星情侶：內地演員鄭愷與圈外女友程曉玥，台灣歌手潘瑋柏搭檔內地女主持吳昕，台灣演員明道搭檔內地女演員王鷗；還有素人情侶加入，一起修煉愛情，傳遞正能量。

programme.title: E26 - 史上最強勢男嘉賓來襲
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E111 - The Vase/The Ollie/The Sorcerer/The Outside/The Copycats
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and 'accidentally' break her latest hideous vase. But when Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: E84
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E221
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: Tiger Cage II
programme.desc: David is a young lawyer who launders money for a gang leader in Chinatown. He is robbed and his assistant got killed when he carries a large sum of cash to Hong Kong. David turns to Waise, his law school buddy, for help. He doesn't realize that it is Waise who sets up the robbery. Petty, Waise's partner in the law firm, finds out that Waise has conducted some illegal activities. Before she could unveil the truth to the police, Petty is murdered. To cover up the truth, Waise finds Mandy, a promising solicitor, as scapegoat of Petty's death. Waise also sends out a gunman to track down Mandy. In a last minute rescue, Mandy is saved by one of her client, Dragon. She always finds the client obnoxious, but now she has to team up with Dragon to fight back and to prove her innocence at the same time...

programme.title: 92' The Legendary La Rose Noire
programme.desc: As soon as Tony Leung, starts imitating the stilted dialogue of 60s heartthrob Lui Kei, film lovers know they've entered a circle of movie-in-jokes and self-conscious world.
